articles.title: Protests over Government's response to rising fuel prices are entering a third day
articles.excerpt: Demonstrations continued yesterday, with escalations including the blockading of fuel depots and the Whitegate oil refinery in Co Cork.
articles.content:
PROTESTS OVER THE Governments response to rising fuel prices are entering a third day, with actions so far involving the blocking of major routes and a refinery.
The cost of petrol, diesel, and mark…

articles.title: System Card: Claude Mythos Preview [pdf] | Hacker News
articles.excerpt: Anthropic has a new model aimed at replacing Opus. IIUC, one of its goals is generating code that is more secure. But also, according to the HN thread, it shows a huge advance on many benchmarks.
articles.content: While we still have months to a year or two left, I will once again remind people that it's not too late to change our current trajectory.You are not "anti-progress" to not want this future we are bu…
